breaches.Name: LinkedIn
breaches.Description: LinkedIn data was exposed in a massive scraping event, including emails, full names, and professional information of over 700 million users.

breaches.Name: Adobe
breaches.Description: Adobe suffered a major security breach exposing user account data including encrypted passwords and hints.

breaches.Name: Canva
breaches.Description: Canva had a data breach that exposed the data of 137 million users, including usernames, names, and email addresses.

note: Mock data — used for demo when live APIs are unavailable or rate-limited.
